title: Mille-Feuille Crispy Lettuce Wraps
description: A creative twist on the classic mille-feuille pastry, using crispy lettuce leaves as the base and adding a tangy fermented flavor. Perfect for a light and refreshing meal or snack.

ingredients.name: Crispy Lettuce Leaves
ingredients.notes: Freshly washed and crisped in a pan

instructions: Cut the mille-feuille pastry into small squares.
Crisp the lettuce leaves in a pan with a pinch of salt.
Arrange a crispy lettuce leaf on a flat surface.
Place a small square of mille-feuille pastry on the lettuce leaf.
Top with a sprinkle of shredded mild cheese.
Dollop a spoonful of fermented cream on top.
Sprinkle with fleur de sel to taste.
Garnish with chopped fresh thyme, if desired.
